_doc: Bibliography / source registry. Every `source` id used across the SSOT must resolve here. Figures are sources too (partOf their publication).

waringo2018.title: The Raschpëtzer — A Roman Underground Water Supply System
waringo2018.publisher: Syndicat d'initiative et de tourisme de la Commune de Walferdange
waringo2018.rights: © the authors / SIT Walferdange; figures reused for research/education
waringo2018.note: Primary source; cited by page [p.N] and figure [fig.N-M].

fig-2-1.title: Roman settlements, catchment areas and the explored qanat conduit

fig-3-1.title: 3D model of the explored qanat conduit (P-7A to P9)

fig-4-2.title: Simplified geological cross-section through the catchment area

fig-4-3.title: Geological structure of the Pëtschend horst (section XY), strata legend

fig-5-4.title: Route / shaft-spacing plan of the qanat
fig-5-4.note: Source of schematic shaft spacing used for modelPos; NOT a georeferenced survey.

fig-5-11.title: P-4 overflow weir and lateral channel (plan + cross sections)

fig-5-24.title: Gallery near P7 with channel; floor at sandstone/marl boundary

fig-6-7.title: View into the 36 m deep shaft P5

survey-shaft-floors.locator: shaft detail drawings P-7A / P-5A / P-4
survey-shaft-floors.title: Surveyed shaft-floor elevations (m a.s.l.)
survey-shaft-floors.note: Source of REAL_FLOOR elevations P-7A 354.3, P-5A 357.5, P-4 355.4 m.

eudem-opentopodata.title: EU-DEM v1.1 (25 m) sampled through the OpenTopoData API
eudem-opentopodata.license: EU-DEM / Copernicus terms; OpenTopoData public instance
eudem-opentopodata.note: Source of the GeoData terrain grid (geodata-walferdange.js); bbox 6.126–6.166 E, 49.662–49.674 N.
